mapper.select:
SELECT ei.*, poi.id, poi.code, poi.content, poi.status, poi.space_id, poi.vehicle_id, poi.start_date, poi.end_date, poi.total_time, poi.price, poi.total_price, poi.pay_date, si.name as spaceName, si.`space` as spaceAddress, vi.vehicle_number, vi.images as vehicleImages, vi.vehicle_no, vi.vehicle_color, ui.code, ui.name, ui.images, ui.phone, ui.email FROM evaluate_info ei left join park_order_info poi on (poi.id = ei.order_id) left join space_info si on (si.id = poi.space_id) left join vehicle_info vi on (vi.id = poi.vehicle_id) left join user_info ui on (ui.id = vi.user_id) WHERE 1 = 1
AND si.name LIKE CONCAT('%',#{parkOrderInfo.spaceName},'%')
AND vi.vehicle_number LIKE CONCAT('%',#{parkOrderInfo.vehicleNumber},'%')
AND ui.name LIKE CONCAT('%',#{parkOrderInfo.userName},'%')
AND poi.code LIKE CONCAT('%',#{parkOrderInfo.orderCode},'%')
AND ui.user_id = #{parkOrderInfo.userId}
ORDER BY ei.create_date DESC
